title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Crompton Greaves

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Crompton Greaves
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!
